noChangelog: This update provides various bug fixes and improvements.

features: Added a new Profiles overview page to quickly view all profiles.
Improved the match statistics view with a new Sankey chart for better dart throw visualization.
The app now shows the changelog directly after updates.
Added a re-open changelog link in the navigation bar.
The updater now displays download statistics during updates.
The updater now closes automatically with a countdown after finishing updates.
fixes: Improved overall app performance and responsiveness.
Checkout options are now fully translated.
Improved window dragging behavior and spacing in the layout.
Various stability and update process improvements.

features: Improved update experience with localized release notes
